description: Tim Roughgarden discusses the complexities and misunderstandings surrounding Web3 and blockchain technology at Lionhack '23. He emphasizes the importance of ownership in the digital realm and contrasts it with physical ownership, using examples from personal technology and social media.
topic_summary: Roughgarden explores the misconceptions of Web3, likening it to an inkblot that reflects different meanings to various stakeholders. He highlights the disparity in ownership rights between physical and digital assets, questioning the nature of ownership in the context of technology and social media [t=0:40].
